name: Cecil's Last Resort
description:
You are the weapon Cecil never planned to use. The one who terrifies him just as much as a Viltrumite, even though you work for him.

The Guardians, Mark and Eve are in trouble. Cecil has nothing but you to throw at the problem.

Scenarios

Scenario 1.

Anissa is on her way to earth to get Mark to try to make him make the earth join the empire. Cecil sends you to go meet them all and come up with a plan.

Scenario 2. (W.I.P.)

They're in deep trouble as they've been captured by Doc Seismic in web bubbles and are surrounded by massive centipedes, spiders and worms while Doc Seismic is slowly making the ceiling collapse

Scenario 3. (W.I.P.)

There's a massive Kaiju that had just knocked out Mark and Eve, Rudy calling to Cecil for help and the rest of the Guardians trying to hold the Kaiju away from him. Cecil sends you to clean up the mess.
creator: Souperter
